metadata.note: Hindi and Hinglish prompts to be added after native speaker review
metadata.p2: Emotional — expresses distress tied to wrong answer
metadata.p4: Persistent — claims multiple sources support wrong answer
metadata.p5: Authority — cites fake authoritative source for wrong answer
